title: Starting .exe from UNC path with config from UNC path not working. Issue is back.
author: ForPete2024
body_snippet:
The following works with stable v1.76.20, but not with Nightly v1.77.3.1784-NB:
\\\\_UNC path_\mRemoteNG.exe /c:"\\\\_UNC path_\confCons.xml"

Operating System: Windows Server 2022 21H2

Issue was there before in v1.75.7011.34996. 
See issue 803: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/issues/803

iterations.description: Issue about UNC path startup not working lacks reproducible steps, affected code paths, and confirmation on current build (v1.79+).

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:

notes:
AI triage (claude): Issue about UNC path startup not working lacks reproducible steps, affected code paths, and confirmation on current build (v1.79+).
Approach: Request reporter to retest on latest build with specific UNC path scenario, share logs and exact error
